#  Announcing the Release of Apache Flink 1.19
March 18, 2024 - Lincoln Lee (@lincoln_86xy)
The Apache Flink PMC is pleased to announce the release of Apache Flink 1.19.0. As usual, we are looking at a packed release with a wide variety of…
